report_name: Vietnam Government Systems Breached, SOCs Fail to Detect Intrusions

attack_patterns.name: PowerShell
attack_patterns.description: Implied as a relevant technique through hunting hints which suggest monitoring for encoded PowerShell commands (`powershell.exe -enc`) used by attackers to hide malicious scripts.

attack_patterns.name: Command Obfuscation
attack_patterns.description: Implied as a relevant technique through hunting hints which suggest monitoring for encoded PowerShell commands, a common method for command obfuscation to evade detection.

attack_patterns.name: Dynamic Resolution
attack_patterns.description: Implied as a relevant technique through hunting hints which suggest monitoring for DNS queries to dynamic DNS domains, which are often used for resilient C2 infrastructure.

identities.name: Vietnamese Ministerial-Level Agencies
identities.description: Two unnamed ministerial-level government agencies in Vietnam that were breached in a major cyberattack, resulting in the potential theft of millions of user records.

indicators.name: Encoded PowerShell Command Execution
indicators.pattern:
title: Encoded PowerShell Command Execution
id: 2b8a1c9d-4e5f-4a1b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of encoded PowerShell commands, a common technique used by attackers to hide malicious scripts from basic logging and evade detection.
references:
  - https://vietnamnet.vn/en/hackers-breach-two-vietnamese-ministerial-systems-in-major-cyberattack-228373.html
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-22
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1027.010
  - attack.defense_evasion
falsepositives:
  - Some legitimate administration scripts may use encoded commands, but it is uncommon and warrants investigation.
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' -enc '
      - ' -e '
      - ' -encodedcommand '
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of PowerShell with encoded command arguments, a technique mentioned in the report's hunting hints for identifying stealthy attacker activity.

indicators.name: Suspicious Dynamic DNS Query
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Dynamic DNS Query
id: 8f9e0d1c-2b3a-4f5e-6d7c-8b9a0c1d2e3f
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to common dynamic DNS (DDNS) providers. Attackers often use DDNS for their C2 infrastructure to quickly change IP addresses and evade blocklists.
references:
  - https://vietnamnet.vn/en/hackers-breach-two-vietnamese-ministerial-systems-in-major-cyberattack-228373.html
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-22
tags:
  - attack.t1568
  - attack.command_and_control
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of DDNS services, though this is often suspicious when originating from servers within an enterprise network.
level: medium
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|endswith:
      - '.ddns.net'
      - '.no-ip.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to common dynamic DNS services, a C2 technique mentioned in the report's hunting hints for identifying stealthy attacker infrastructure.
